authorized_next_action: Acquire additional independently verified physical incidents and reviewed safe test actions; ADAPT remains parser and evidence-plane validation only.

gates.detail: The source lock must fail closed on changed bytes.
gates.requirement: Every resource matches its frozen SHA-256 and byte count.

gates.detail: Silent file, row, or join loss invalidates the run.
gates.requirement: Every discovered experiment is parsed exactly once with an exact evidence/truth join.

gates.detail: Truth is represented only by a commitment in the evidence plane.
gates.requirement: Fault metadata and injection-internal rows are absent from model-visible evidence.
At least 30 incidents have independently identified mechanisms.

gates.detail: A fault label alone does not demonstrate diagnostic ambiguity.
gates.requirement: At least 30 incidents carry two or more pre-outcome plausible hypotheses.

gates.detail: Static telemetry cannot imply unobserved counterfactual test outcomes.
gates.requirement: At least 30 incidents have an independently reviewed safe discriminating test.

gates.detail: One physical testbed cannot establish cross-hardware transfer.
gates.requirement: At least two hardware families, two hardware identities, and two fault families permit grouped transfer.

gates.detail: Channel count does not itself establish a multimodal benefit.
gates.requirement: At least 30 incidents have two operational channels with explicit clock domains.
